TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouConv-informants

S.FORM: eh 'ua ci la c'o mako miski ho lako ahtu emoemo'unu tan'e.
S.TRANSL: 你來這裡，至少也在這裡過一夜。
When you come here, I hope that you can at least stay overnight at times.

S.FORM: 'so aavaho man'i ci hioa a'a s'a ahtu meelʉ uh mai no nte to'tohʉngʉ ho 'so ah man'i ci hioa ne tapangʉ.
S.TRANSL: 而且有很多工作...我不能照我想的...達邦有很多工作。
Moreover, so much work... I cannot do so as I wish; so much work in TapangU.

S.FORM: 'a te la eno aiti hoci la ake'i ea zikang ho te la ahtu a'ʉmtʉ miski ho na iho bobaito.
S.TRANSL: 這個嘛... 如果我有一點時間我就可以過夜在台北到處看看。
Let's see...if (I) have a little time, (I) can stay overnight and look around (Taipei).

S.FORM: X'a eno a'ʉmtʉ botngonUX 'e eatatiskova tan'evo.
S.TRANSL: 對，這裡真的有很多人。
Right. There are many people here.

S.FORM: en ne taseona ne mi'o eon to hikooki a.
S.TRANSL: 早上我坐飛機。
On that morning I took an airplane.

S.FORM: a'ʉmtʉ.
S.TRANSL: 真的?
Really?

S.FORM: e'vono na'no sʉfeʉngnʉ aʉmta eainca taunona'vʉ 'o hia botngonʉ.
S.TRANSL: 雖然很早，我很驚訝怎麼那麼多人。
Although I left very early, I felt amazed that there are a lot of people there.

S.FORM: mo nia'te sʉngcʉngcʉ 'o mo na i'o mo a'ʉmtʉ na'no meoi no hikoki ne taseona.
S.TRANSL: 早上那個很大的飛機幾乎坐滿。
The very large airplane on that morning was almost full.

S.FORM: uhm 'a isi no eainca to sensei mainci mais'a mo na'no botngonʉ 'e mo na i'e mo smopaeo ta hikoki maitan'e.
S.TRANSL: 台大的教授說今天的飛機似乎人很多。
The teacher said it seems that there're quite a lot of people on the airplane today.

S.FORM: 'a os'o eno eainca mo eno a'ʉmtʉ 'a mo.
S.TRANSL: 我也說,這個真的是...
I also said, this is really...

S.FORM: abohtʉ XeaeusuhngiX.
S.TRANSL: 很幸運,有位置。
Fortunately, (you) got a seat.

S.FORM: ah isi no aeoca ah ah zou 'asvʉta na i'o te'o eusuhngi ta ta eatan'e eatan'e.
S.TRANSL: 啊...那是事先... 這裡的人是先幫我預定了位置。
My seat has been reserved in advance by the people here.

S.FORM: mhm ko'ko eno 'aa la smoeo no uk'a eusuhngi ho mo na iho mo noavovei.
S.TRANSL: 因此我來回坐不怕沒有位置。
Therefore I will not be afraid of being without a seat when I go back and forth.

S.FORM: 'a ta'u no cu XeaicaX asvʉta na i'o ta'u eusuhngi no ho ta'u cu maine'e ho eofna.
S.TRANSL: 我晚上回家的位置已經預定了。
My seat for going home in the evening has already been reserved.

S.FORM: Xta n'a aʉmtaX ngoh ngohngoseo ho mo maici eahioa co cono euovei XcinoX mhm cono hie.
S.TRANSL: 一天之內來回真的非常累。
The back and forth in one day is really exhausting.

S.FORM: eh uvo honci s'a o'te peelʉi na na su na nte o'te meelʉ ma sia na nte n'a ahtu meelʉ .
S.TRANSL: 你怎麼有可能不會？如果連你都不行，還有誰能？
How could it be possible that you can't? If you cannot (do it well), who else can do it?

S.FORM: nanʉhtʉ na i'o os'o hia how teachPF.
S.TRANSL: 我教的是短的(句子)。
What I teach is short (sentences).

M.TRANSL: 照上下文推論應該是一個受焦動詞

S.FORM: maica ho moso 'enepio 'o mo tuocosʉ mais'a mo ep'ʉcʉ na i'o na i'o hia tuocosʉ ho mo alʉ 'enepio 'o mo maikuyungu.
S.TRANSL: 有很多人問我問題。他們問的內容很複雜，問的情況就像這樣很多人圍著我。
There are many people asking questions. The situation is like this: there are many people surrounding me; what they asked is so complicated.

S.FORM: eh 'a os'o aothoma cohivi na 'e uN maka peelʉi aʉmta eainca yut'inga na ina i'o zou esansana na ihe aʉmta ucia cohivi.
S.TRANSL: 我試著去瞭解，至少我能去回答，也就是弄清楚他們真的想要知道的。
I try to understandt, at least I am able to answer, that is to clarify what they really want to know.

S.FORM: os'o eno o'te pnanfi na ina os'o ake'a cohivi ho zou ho eʉsvʉta na ito ihe 'ucia tuocosi.
S.TRANSL: 我盡我最大的努力，用我稍微知道的一點知識，去回答他們想問我的。
I try my best to answer what they want to ask with my limited knowledge.

S.FORM: tehin'i s'a eno o'te a'ʉmta zou cohivi na na iko eʉsvUta.
S.TRANSL: 他們應該真的知道你所告訴他們的。
They should really understand what you've told them.

S.FORM: ho X man na'no uhm zou man'i 'o lako co'cohivi.
S.TRANSL: 你知道的很多。
You know a lot.

S.FORM: ita mo abohtʉ ihe taeoci 'e i'e tehe tuocosi ko'ko os'o no hueoci ho na iho na iho te'o cu uh tan'e.
S.TRANSL: 很幸運他們要問的都事先寫下來，因此我來這裡的時候可以先看。
It's lucky that what they want to ask will be written down in advance, therefore, I can see them in advance when I come here.

S.FORM: mhm 'a ina tehin'i so la hia hia so tiova ta na ita ta 'oeonatmopsʉ tan'e.
S.TRANSL: (那要看)在這裡做研究的會不會接受他們。
(It will depend on) if they will be accepted by the research group here.

S.FORM: XuNh isi so asona ake'a asvʉta na ina yupasʉ no ntehe hia tuocosʉ zou zou na ntehe eoho'a tuococosi.
S.TRANSL: 或許是因為他們用來邀請讓他們問問題的人（鄒語發音人）的經費有限制。
It's because their funding to invite people for them to ask (Tsou imformants) is probably limited.

S.FORM: ko'ko o'a mo meelʉ uhm maubotngonʉ na ina ntehe eoho'a.
S.TRANSL: 因此，能請的發音人不多。
Therefore, the (informants) invited may not be a lot.

S.FORM: 'e isi so'a'ausna na ita na ita isi eainca eh ta mo c'o macoconci toposʉ zou eh 'a eno eni 'e mo ah cu a'ʉmta cohivi ho mo na iho mo uh tan'e.
S.TRANSL: 每個字放的位置...這是我們來這裡真的知道的。
(we have to know how to put together) the position of every word. This is what we really know when we came here.

S.FORM: nia nte a'ʉmta eainca noemʉhʉ ho eh te la peelʉi tapeaemʉha 'o nte la aanana'va pat'ausna ta e'e no cou.
S.TRANSL: (如果)所謂的真正的鄒語的用法中的字能夠（像這樣）被收集起來。
(If) The so-called real expressions of Tsou words can be collected all together (like this),

S.FORM: eh ko'ko eno mo ho mi'o uh tan'e mi'o engha a'ʉmtʉ aveoveoeʉ ho os'o tatotohʉngva ho mo man'i 'o os'o peelʉi cohivi na nte la ti'a'ausna ta na ita mo na ita mo buacou.
S.TRANSL: 因此，當我來這裡，我很感動當我思考並且知道許當方法處理關於怎麼說鄒語。
Therefore, when I come here, I'm quite touched when I think and know many ways (methods) of dealing with speaking Tsou.

S.FORM: nte a'ʉmta eainca koasi ʉmnʉ ho Xmi'o uhtan'eX.
S.TRANSL: 這就是來這裡的好處。
This is really the advantage of coming here.

S.FORM: te nana mainenu honcito la pa'cohivneni hin'i 'o 'o i 'o imu teai ci tposʉ no cou ho no ataveisi ho tamu cu teopʉngi.
S.TRANSL: 等你完成了你在撰寫的鄒語的書，也讓他們知道，如何？
How about if you let them know the contents of the Tsou books you are making, after you finish them?

S.FORM: ehm XnteX 'so atvaesi ʉmnʉ hoci na ihoci Xhin'iX eaica iv'oha 'o os'o faeni ci na ici tposʉ.
S.TRANSL: 如果他們能夠瞭解我給他們的書，那真的很好。
It will be terrific if they could realize/know the book I gave to them.

S.FORM: eh mai to no 'o e'e ne momza la momza la JgekiJ zou 'a mo coni os'o faeni ho enca 'a temu no aʉsvʉta aiti mo oh.
S.TRANSL: 像我們在戲裡演的台詞，我已經給他們了，並且說，你們讀讀看。
Like the words (we said) when we act in the drama, I already gave them one copy, and said 'You try to read (this).'

S.FORM: 'a mo na'no man'i 'o mo eupaeut'ingi mhm eh hoci peelʉi 'o mo eupaeut'ingi ehm peelʉi cohivi 'o isi enca ho mo mav'ov'o ci pat'ausna.
S.TRANSL: (劇本裡)有很多對話，如果能知道這些對話，那個就能知道各種的說法。
There are many conversations (in the script), if these conversations could be known, then various ways of expressions can be known.

S.FORM: mhm ah nenusi no tehe peelʉi mo man'i na ntehe peelʉi epeia ci ihe ucia cohivi ta mo eh mici aʉsvʉtʉ ta e'e ta cou a'toana.
S.TRANSL: 我不知道他們能不能... 對那些想要研究鄒語的人而言，有很多是他們能夠選擇想要知道的。
(I) don't know whether they can.... (For those who) want to practice our Tsou language, there are many (things) which they can select what they want to know (according to their needs).

S.FORM: ma nte la a'ʉmtʉ man'i 'o nte n'a la peelʉi tposi no XnteX la titho ta e'e ta cou ho tposi ci ma'o'oenghava ci ci 'oenghava ta cou ho mocmo ci cou.
S.TRANSL: 能被寫下來的有很多，（像是）我們能用鄒語去寫各種鄒族還有其他族的傳說故事。
Those which can be written down are many, (like) we can use Tsou words to write down various legends of Tsou and other people.

S.FORM: 'a os'o no os'o enca no koe'u hoci eh hoci la meelʉ amso nana 'so na nte titha ci hie.
S.TRANSL: 我想如果我們時間夠的話,
I think if the time we could use is enough,

S.FORM: os'o enca no to'tohʉngʉ'u eh te c'o la maica eainca zou pasuhcza 'o isi enca na i'e iachi to e'e.
S.TRANSL: 我想（我們應該）這樣開始，使我們自己的語言一致。
I think (we should) start like this, that is to unify the so-called our own language.

S.FORM: ci lea no o'te asngʉcʉ eahioa mai to no ziten eh ta c'u imza cu asona acʉha eainca no koe'u te amaka teopʉngi ta tonsoha maitan'e na i'o eh i'o la c'o letititha ho la c'o n'a ho la ea'ei maitain'e.
S.TRANSL: 我們經常做，像字典，我們經常一起想，我們或許至少可以完成今年以來像現在在討論的部分。
We work more often, like the dictionary, perhaps we frequently think together. we could at least probably complete the materials we have discussed today this year.

S.FORM: zou eh maka Xacʉha sotoyanzaX 'e mo maica ci tposʉ ho te la ko'ko meelʉ.
S.TRANSL: 至少像這樣把字放在一起，因此我們能...
At least put words like this all together and therefore (we) can...

S.FORM: eh ina cu mocmosi 'a la no o'te ti'uhuhuca ho ho siho sopuhngi na i'e na i'e tposʉ.
S.TRANSL: 至於其他的事（除了前面提到的），（我們）應該同時持續的增加我們的字彙，當我們在收集會話的資料。
As for other things (things besides previous mentioned), (we) should constantly increase our lexicon at the same time with doing the conversation materials.'

S.FORM: ah 'a neni 'e os'o a'ʉmta eainca temza mi'uni ta tonsoha maitan'e ho 'anana'veni.
S.TRANSL: 這些是我們說我們今年要面對並且努力去做的。
This is really what we said we will face and work hard for this year.

S.FORM: temu av'a 'o isi enca eN ziten 'o tesi ongko s'o Xisi teai ci tposʉX .
S.TRANSL: 你怎麼叫我們所謂的字典，就是說，你的書的書名是什麼？
What will you call the so-called dictionary, that is, what's the name of your book?

S.FORM: X'a os'o 'so h'unana a'ʉmta cohivi na ina nteX os'o enca na ina nte enca huo'omza tposʉ.
S.TRANSL: 我真的不知道怎麼去命名。
I do not really know how to name the book.

S.FORM: 'so hoci 'so at'ingha enca ho huo'omza tposʉ mais'a nte nte mais'a 'a nte a'ʉmtʉ alʉ amso na ino ntesi a'ʉmta 'e 'a'ausna.
S.TRANSL: 如果（我們）叫它huo'omza tposʉ,好像並不能真的代表真正的含意。
If (we) name it huo'omza tposʉ, it does not seem to fully express the real intention (behind the book).

S.FORM: c'o at'ingha enca huo'omza ta e'e no cou eN.
S.TRANSL: （我們）還是先叫它huo' omza ta e'e no cou。
Let's (temporarily) call it huo' omza ta e'e no cou ( Tsou texts).

S.FORM: ne mo'u la ahtu moemo'unu ne gaikoku ma Xmicu asonʉX na'no man'i na ihe leai to XhmʉhmʉskʉX ehm cou ci XeanecovhiX ci mo mai to imu hioa.
S.TRANSL: 我去外國走走參觀的時候，有很多像我們一樣的原住民在做像你一樣做的事情。
when I once went abroad and walked around, there are many faraway aborigines like us do the same thing like you.

S.FORM: uhm temza no o'te tmotalʉ ho na iho Xpan noX lahe teai.
S.TRANSL: 當他們在做的時候，我們會好好聽（注意）。
We will listen (pay attention to) when they are making.

S.FORM: pan to moso la 'anana'o pan to moso na'no 'anana'o ci mo i'mi ne amelika eh ic'o na mo a'a isi 'so pa pa'teni.
S.TRANSL: 有一個從美國來的...他沒有讓(我們)看（他做的）。
There was a (man) from America, (but he) did not show us (what he's doing).

S.FORM: eh i'o i'o mai to no tsaishenfu ho Xsi koa 'so na eaezaX eh tesi akoeva no eh te maezo moeai ziten.
S.TRANSL: 像蔡神父，XXXXX，他也想要做字典。
Like Father Tsai, XXXXX, he intends to make a dictionary as well.

S.FORM: mio h'unasi no temu hioa?.
S.TRANSL: 這個和你的工作不同嗎？
Is this different from your work?

S.FORM: 'aa mo X.
S.TRANSL: No, (they)...

S.FORM: te nana Xo'a isi 'so ahtaX aiti na iho na ina isi teoteai to tsai shenf 'aa isi cohivi na na na ina hiasi hunasi.
S.TRANSL: 因為我們沒看到蔡神父做的，我們不知道怎麼不一樣。
Because we do not see what father Tasi made, we do not know how it differs.

S.FORM: o'a tesi akoeva no so'upa no temu hioa.
S.TRANSL: 他不想把你們做的也包含進去嗎？
Doesn't he intend to combine your works?

S.FORM: eh bochio ho aa lamza so ahtu eupteʉteʉlʉ ho na iho na iho toʉsvʉsvʉtʉ ta mo maica ci 'a'ausna.
S.TRANSL: 誰知道？因為我們沒有見面討論過這個事。
Who knows? (It is) because we never meet and discuss situations like this.

S.FORM: a no aveoveoʉneni hoci isi na ihoci isi faeni ci osi.
S.TRANSL: 我們會感激如果他能給我們（一本他的著作）。
We would appreciate it if he could give us (a copy of his work).

S.FORM: pan to no o'te tposʉ ci osi la faeni ho osi cu la ake'a pahtotoeanza na i'o i'o mav'ov'o ci tposʉ ho.
S.TRANSL: 他給了我們一本書，上面是按字母排的生詞。
He gave us a book containing alphabetically listed words.
